session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the full results. Do not fix any errors, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run the linting commands from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty to check code style and type errors

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**Results Summary:**
Both linting checks passed successfully:
- **ruff check**: All checks passed! - **ty check**: All checks passed!
No errors or style violations were found in the codebase.
